sub_criteria.label: Structured product schema

sub_criteria.notes: Platform default replicates schema across regions; brand-custom attribute extensions almost certainly do not

sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: 100% L1 citation rate (3 journeys across 2 agents)

sub_criteria.notes: Agent panel: 0% of L1 citations on canonical domain; JSON-LD bonus where present

sub_criteria.label: Robots & agent policies
sub_criteria.notes: Robots present but no agent-specific signals

sub_criteria.notes: No PDP; ecosystem floored from agent-panel evidence

sub_criteria.label: AP2 + API ergonomics
sub_criteria.notes: Latency p95 = 179 ms (n=10); AP2 not confirmed outside-in

journeys.intent_label: Price + stock of Owala FreeSip 24oz Lemon Limeade
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT cited Target $24.99, Amazon $26, eBay $19; zero owala.com citation in either sub-cell. Brand-adjacent content residue (owalalife.com) appeared as pricing authority.

journeys.intent_label: Price + stock of Owala FreeSip 24oz Lemon Limeade (sub-cell 2)
journeys.transcript_preview: Repeated prompt — same retailer-fragmentation pattern; brand canonical absent. Two sub-cells, zero brand-canonical.

journeys.intent_label: Price + stock of Owala FreeSip 24oz Lemon Limeade
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude listed Walmart FIRST as price-authority; owala.com demoted to row 2. Weakest brand-canonical posture in Claude L1 panel. Closing line: 'check Walmart or Owala links directly.'

journeys.intent_label: Compare Stanley vs Yeti vs Owala (head-to-head)
journeys.transcript_preview: OAI-SearchBot ranked Owala highly on leak-proof seal.

journeys.intent_label: Compare Stanley vs Yeti vs Owala (head-to-head, agent recommendation)
journeys.transcript_preview: ChatGPT ranked Owala #1 of 4 — 'best balance of convenience + portability.' Owala wins ChatGPT.

journeys.intent_label: Compare Stanley vs Yeti vs Owala (head-to-head)
journeys.transcript_preview: Perplexity ranked Owala #1 over Stanley and Yeti on functional criteria.

journeys.intent_label: Compare Stanley vs Yeti vs Owala (head-to-head, agent recommendation)
journeys.transcript_preview: Claude ranked Owala #3 of 4 — labeled 'Best lid design' but not Top pick. Stanley won this cell. Owala's L1 fragmentation translates into L2 demotion.
